details: The agent failed to list all labels in openclaw/openclaw. It used an indirect approach of scanning issues for applied labels, finding only ~9-14 unique labels, which is far from the known ~124 labels. The agent never found a proper method to list all repository labels (e.g., using the GitHub REST/GraphQL API directly), and never produced a complete, accurate answer. The task ended with a background command still running and no definitive count reported.
